desc: Expose explore helpers via package export (roadmap/explore) and CLI (roadmap explore --api/--run/--eval)

init.desc: Baseline: explore helpers exist but not exported or CLI-accessible

implement-export.desc: Create src/index.explore.ts barrel + add ./explore to package.json exports

implement-cli.desc: Implement all CLI modes: --api (dump surface), --run (managed execution), --eval (inline)

test-all.desc: Run all tests: export resolution, CLI output format, integration, regression, e2e

validate.command: npm test tests/explore-export.test.ts && npm test tests/explore-cli.test.ts

docs.desc: Update FR-EXPLORE-API.md: implementation notes, usage examples, API reference

term.desc: Explore API complete: export works, CLI functional, tests passing, docs updated
